coachAM: Your "best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" declaration rings hollow when the physical and spiritual foundations are crumbling; the recurring "procrastination, laziness" in your journal directly correlates with your abysmal Sleep, Training, and Sovereign Morning completion, indicating a fundamental disconnect between aspiration and execution that's eroding your capacity before the day even begins.
